meta.incident: Stripe API rate limit (429) hit during payment burst: latency spikes -> 429 errors -> retries exhausted -> dead-letter queue overflow and payment success rate collapses, amid recurring invalid-card-number distractor

ground_truth.desc: Stripe response time above p99 threshold before rate limit
Stripe returned HTTP 429 on payment API calls
Payment orders permanently failed after retry budget consumed
Alert fired on payment failure rate

evidence.text: {"level": "error", "message": "stripe api error: Request failed with status code 429", "timestamp": "2026-05-04T09:00:12.334Z", "service": "payment-svc", "pid": 7711, "statusCode": 429}

{"level": "error", "message": "payment processing failed orderId=ord-0205 err=\"stripe rate limit exceeded\"", "timestamp": "2026-05-04T09:00:13.445Z", "service": "payment-svc", "pid": 7711, "orderId": "ord-0205"}
